body_txt: Since Most Writers Are Human , most humanoid interspecies crossbreeds are Half Human Hybrids . However, sometimes this is averted, and a hybrid has no Homo sapiens in their family tree at all... but will still look human, sometimes even attractively so. Like its sibling trope, it may lead to Uneven Hybrids or Heinz Hybrids if the person in question isn't a dead-end of the family tree, or even True Breeding Hybrids if there are enough of a specific mix-type to come together and perpetuate a bloodline. Super-Trope to Blended Beastfolk , which is specifically about anthropomorphic animal hybrids. Compare Hybrid Monster , which concerns non humanoid mixes of supernatural species.
